research.title: Multi-Day Autonomous Agents with Fable 5 and Managed Agents (Outcomes + Rubrics)
research.whyTrending: Fable 5's headline capability is days-long autonomous work; Managed Agents' define_outcome + rubric grading is the intended harness. Almost no hands-on content pairing the two.

seo.suggestedTitle: Multi-Day Autonomous Agents: Fable 5 + Managed Agents Guide

strategy.angle: Hands-on pairing of Fable 5's long-horizon capability with the Managed Agents outcome/rubric harness — working code from agent creation to downloaded deliverables, plus the operational gotchas (idle gates, stream reconnects) nobody documents
strategy.title: Multi-Day Autonomous Agents: Fable 5 + Managed Agents Guide
strategy.excerpt: I gave Fable 5 a rubric and a container and checked in twice a day. Here is the full Managed Agents setup - outcomes, graders, event streams - with working code.
outline: Managed Agents primer: agent once, session per run
Operational gotchas: idle gate, stream reconnect, webhooks
